name: @coreyuan/vector-mind
description: VectorMind MCP: requirement-driven context memory linking file changes to developer intent.

scripts.build: tsc && node --input-type=module -e "import { chmodSync } from 'node:fs'; for (const f of ['dist/index.js','dist/rtk-shim.js']) try { chmodSync(f, 0o755); } catch {}"
